name: ap-invoice-review-claude-ocr
description: Self-serve AP invoice MCPB with Claude OCR-to-decision folder review.
long_description: Review visible local AP invoice folders by rendering invoice, purchase order, and goods receipt PDFs as images and requiring Claude OCR before deterministic AP matching. JSON sidecars are not used. OCR results are written only to _runs/<run_id>/ocr_results. Never uses Airtable, Google Drive, or external ERP/SaaS writes.

tools.name: ap_invoice_setup_demo_workspace
tools.description: Export bundled image-rendered demo PDFs to a visible local Documents/APInvoiceDemo folder.

tools.name: ap_invoice_list_demo_cases
tools.description: List visible local AP invoice demo cases, folders, PDFs, and expected outcomes.

tools.name: ap_invoice_prepare_ocr_run
tools.description: Render a PDF-only AP invoice folder to image content for Claude OCR.

tools.name: ap_invoice_submit_ocr_result
tools.description: Validate Claude OCR results and save OCR JSON under _runs/<run_id>/ocr_results.

tools.name: ap_invoice_review_from_ocr_result
tools.description: Run AP rules from saved Claude OCR results and return the final decision.

tools.name: ap_invoice_preview_folder
tools.description: Preview a PDF-only local folder and classify invoice, purchase order, and goods receipt PDFs.

tools.name: ap_invoice_review_folder
tools.description: Start Claude OCR review for a visible local AP invoice folder.

tools.name: ap_invoice_review_demo_case
tools.description: Start Claude OCR review for a bundled demo case from the visible APInvoiceDemo workspace.

tools.name: ap_invoice_explain_exception
tools.description: Explain a completed Claude OCR AP review exception by run_id.

tools.name: ap_invoice_build_approval_brief
tools.description: Build an approver-facing brief for a completed Claude OCR AP review by run_id.

tools.name: ap_invoice_ocr_smoke_test
tools.description: Diagnostic: return a fixed invoice PNG as MCP image content so Claude Desktop can perform OCR.

tools.name: ap_invoice_submit_ocr_smoke_test_result
tools.description: Diagnostic: validate Claude's OCR smoke result and save it under _runs/<run_id>/ocr_results.

tools.name: list_ap_demo_cases
tools.description: Blocked compatibility tool: use ap_invoice_list_demo_cases instead.

tools.name: review_ap_demo_case
tools.description: Blocked compatibility tool: use ap_invoice_review_demo_case instead.

tools.name: review_ap_invoice_packet
tools.description: Blocked compatibility tool: use the Claude OCR folder flow instead.

tools.name: explain_ap_exception
tools.description: Blocked compatibility tool: use ap_invoice_explain_exception with a completed run_id.

tools.name: build_ap_approval_brief
tools.description: Blocked compatibility tool: use ap_invoice_build_approval_brief with a completed run_id.

tools.name: create_ap_review_case
tools.description: Blocked advanced tool: use the Claude OCR folder flow instead.

tools.name: upload_ap_document
tools.description: Blocked advanced tool: use a PDF-only local folder instead.

tools.name: start_ap_invoice_review
tools.description: Blocked advanced tool: deterministic sidecar review is disabled.

tools.name: get_ap_invoice_review_result
tools.description: Blocked advanced tool: final results are returned by ap_invoice_review_from_ocr_result.

tools.name: build_erp_draft_payload
tools.description: Blocked advanced tool: draft payloads are included in completed OCR review results.
